name: amaze
description: amaze - unified AI coding agent (code intelligence, semantic search, memory, skills, channels, desktop & sandbox control)

scripts.build: tsgo -p tsconfig.build.json && npm run copy-assets && shx chmod +x dist/cli.js
scripts.build:binary: npm --prefix ../tui run build && npm --prefix ../ai run build && npm --prefix ../agent run build && npm run build && bun build --compile --no-compile-autoload-dotenv --minify --keep-names ./dist/bun/cli.js ./src/utils/image-resize-worker.ts --outfile dist/amaze && npm run copy-binary-assets
scripts.copy-assets: shx mkdir -p dist/modes/interactive/theme/defaults && shx cp src/modes/interactive/theme/*.json dist/modes/interactive/theme/ && shx cp src/modes/interactive/theme/defaults/*.json dist/modes/interactive/theme/defaults/ && shx mkdir -p dist/modes/interactive/assets && shx cp src/modes/interactive/assets/*.png dist/modes/interactive/assets/ && shx mkdir -p dist/core/export-html/vendor && shx cp src/core/export-html/template.html src/core/export-html/template.css src/core/export-html/template.js dist/core/export-html/ && shx cp src/core/export-html/vendor/*.js dist/core/export-html/vendor/
scripts.copy-binary-assets: shx cp package.json dist/ && shx cp README.md dist/ && shx cp CHANGELOG.md dist/ && shx mkdir -p dist/theme && shx cp src/modes/interactive/theme/*.json dist/theme/ && shx mkdir -p dist/assets && shx cp src/modes/interactive/assets/*.png dist/assets/ && shx mkdir -p dist/export-html/vendor && shx cp src/core/export-html/template.html dist/export-html/ && shx cp src/core/export-html/vendor/*.js dist/export-html/vendor/ && shx cp -r docs dist/ && shx cp -r examples dist/ && shx cp ../../node_modules/@silvia-odwyer/photon-node/photon_rs_bg.wasm dist/
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run clean && npm run build && npm run shrinkwrap

author: Mario Zechner
